<{%fg 2%}>+ pulumi:providers:pkgA: (create)
<{%fg 2%}>    [urn=urn:pulumi:test::test::pulumi:providers:pkgA::"double quotes"]
<{%reset%}><{%reset%}><{%fg 2%}>+ pkgA:m:typA: (create)
<{%fg 2%}>    [urn=urn:pulumi:test::test::pkgA:m:typA::"double quotes"]
<{%reset%}><{%fg 2%}>    [provider=urn:pulumi:test::test::pulumi:providers:pkgA::"double quotes"::46ef67a6-0cb6-409d-a455-ab4b140ed880]
<{%reset%}><{%reset%}>    <{%fg 2%}>+ pkgA:m:typB: (create)
<{%fg 2%}>        [urn=urn:pulumi:test::test::pkgA:m:typA$pkgA:m:typB::"double quotes"]
<{%reset%}><{%reset%}><{%fg 13%}><{%bold%}>Resources:<{%reset%}>
    <{%fg 2%}>+ 3 created<{%reset%}>

<{%fg 13%}><{%bold%}>Duration:<{%reset%}> 1s
